question: What verse compares a blessed person to a tree planted by streams of water?
What verse shows that when the soul prospers, all areas of life prosper and are in good health?
What verse shows there are two types of trees — good and bad?
What verse shows that water represents the Word of God?
What verse says that if Jesus' words remain in you, you can ask whatever you wish and it will be given?
What verse says that turning a deaf ear to the law makes even one's prayers detestable?
What verse says that wrong motives in prayer mean one does not receive?
What verse says the mind of sinful man is death, but the mind controlled by the Spirit is life and peace?
What verse says Jesus' words are spirit and life?
What verse says God formed the spirit of man?
What verse shows that those who live according to the sinful nature are hostile to God, while those who live by the Spirit belong to Christ?
What verse shows that those who love God keep His teachings, and those who do not love Him do not obey?
What verse shows that a true believer is one inwardly, not outwardly?
What verse shows that believers must be able to interpret the present time?
What verse shows that God always makes a covenant with His chosen people?
What verse says the Law of Moses, Prophets, and Psalms all point to Jesus?
What verse says God is not a man that He should lie, and what He promises He fulfills?
What are the 4 main contents of the Bible? Give a reference verse for each.
What verse says Jesus told things before they happened so that when they did, people would believe?
What verse says the rulers of that age did not understand God's hidden wisdom and crucified Jesus?
What verse says his own people did not receive Jesus?
What verse says the Jews tried to kill Jesus?
What verse says the kingdom of God was taken away and given to a people who would produce its fruit?
What verse shows that a new covenant was established because of the failure of the first?
What verse says God will put His laws in their minds and write them on their hearts?
What verse shows the believers at the First Coming did not recognize Jesus because they did not understand the prophecies?
Give 6 examples of Old Testament prophecies fulfilled at the First Coming with reference verses.
correct: Isa 7:14 → Mt 1:18-23: Jesus born of a virgin
Mic 5:2 → Lk 2:1-7: Jesus born in Bethlehem
Hos 11:1 → Mt 2:1-6: Jesus comes out of Egypt
Isa 9:1-2 → Mt 4:13-16: Jesus begins ministry in Capernaum
Zech 9:9-10 → Mt 21:1-9: Jesus enters on a donkey
Ex 12:46 → Jn 19:36-37: Jesus' bones not broken

question: Write the content of the promise God made with Abraham in Genesis 15:13-14.
correct: Descendants will be strangers in a country not their own
God will punish the nation they serve as slaves
They will come out with great possessions and return to Canaan

question: What verse says surely as God has planned, so it will be, and as He has purposed, so it will stand?
What verse shows that false prophets come in sheep's clothing but are recognized by their fruit?
What verse says the devil is a liar and the father of lies with no truth in him?
What verse says the ear tests words as the tongue tastes food?
What verse says Satan sets himself up in God's temple proclaiming himself to be God?
What verse says the knowledge of the secrets of the kingdom of heaven is given to 'you' but not to 'them'?
What verse shows that those outside hear parables so they may be ever seeing but never perceiving?
What verses show that Jesus fulfilled the Old Testament prophecy of speaking in parables?
What verse says the unfolded (revealed) word is light?
What verse describes the sealed scroll that no one could understand — representing the time of night?
What verse says Jesus is the light of the world and that night is coming when no one can work?
What verse shows no one in heaven or earth could open the sealed scroll — representing the night after Jesus ascended?
What verse urges believers to understand the present time, that the night is nearly over and the day is almost here?
